description.en: You attempt to absorb some of an enemy’s health. Make a ranged attack on a creature. On a hit, the creature takes 1d4 + MOVE grass damage. Half the damage done is restored by the user.
description.pt: Você tenta absorver um pouco da saúde de um inimigo. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância contra uma criatura. Em um acerto, a criatura sofre 1d4 + MOVE de dano de planta. Metade do dano causado é restaurada pelo usuário.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d4 at level 5, 3d4 at level 11, and 4d4 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d4 no nível 5, 3d4 no nível 11 e 4d4 no nível 17.

description.en: Faster than a blink of an eye, you smack the opponent with a bit of rock. You may move up to your speed and make a melee attack. On a hit, the Pokémon takes 1d4 + MOVE rock damage
description.pt: Mais rápido que um piscar de olhos, você atinge o oponente com um pedaço de rocha. Você pode se mover até o seu deslocamento e fazer um ataque corpo a corpo. Em um acerto, o Pokémon sofre 1d4 + MOVE de dano de pedra.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 1d6 at level 5, 1d10 at level 11, and 2d8 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d6 no nível 5, 1d10 no nível 11 e 2d8 no nível 17.

description.en: You create a stream of hot acid and aim it at your enemy. Make a ranged attack roll, doing 1d6 + MOVE poison damage on a hit.
description.pt: Você cria um fluxo de ácido quente e o aponta para seu inimigo. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância, causando 1d6 + MOVE de dano de veneno em um acerto.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d6 at level 5, 3d6 at level 11, and 4d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d6 no nível 5, 3d6 no nível 11 e 4d6 no nível 17.

description.en: You are surrounded by a shield of thick acid for the duration. During this time, your AC increases by 2, and any Pokémon that hits you with a melee attack takes 1d8 poison damage.
description.pt: Você é cercado por um escudo de ácido espesso pela duração. Durante este tempo, sua CA aumenta em 2, e qualquer Pokémon que atingir você com um ataque corpo a corpo sofre 1d8 de dano de veneno.

higherLevels.en: Poison damage increases to 2d8 At level 10.
higherLevels.pt: O dano de veneno aumenta para 2d8 no nível 10.

description.en: You spit a spray of acid in a 15 foot cone originating from yourself. Each creature in the area must make a Constitution saving throw against your MOVE DC. On a failure the creature takes 2d4 poison damage and has disadvantage on its next saving throw. On a success they take half damage and do not get the disadvantage on their saving throw.
description.pt: Você cospe um spray de ácido em um cone de 15 pés originando-se de você. Cada criatura na área deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição contra a sua CD de MOVE. Em uma falha, a criatura sofre 2d4 de dano de veneno e tem desvantagem em seu próximo teste de resistência. Em um sucesso, ela sofre metade do dano e não recebe desvantagem em seu teste de resistência.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 4d4 at level 5, 6d4 at level 11, and 8d4 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 4d4 no nível 5, 6d4 no nível 11 e 8d4 no nível 17.

description.en: You move through the battlefield, making a quick succession of strikes. When you use this action you do not take attacks of opportunity until the end of your turn. You may make three melee attacks against different targets as you move. Each attack does 1d6 + MOVE flying damage.
description.pt: Você se move pelo campo de batalha, fazendo uma sucessão rápida de golpes. Quando você usa esta ação, você não sofre ataques de oportunidade até o final do seu turno. Você pode fazer três ataques corpo a corpo contra alvos diferentes enquanto se move. Cada ataque causa 1d6 + MOVE de dano voador.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 1d10 at level 5, 2d6 at level 11, and 2d10 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d10 no nível 5, 2d6 no nível 11 e 2d10 no nível 17.

description.en: You use a secret technique to calm and cleanse yourself. When you use this move you can end one effect on yourself that is causing you to be charmed, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned, flinched, or stunned.
description.pt: Você usa uma técnica secreta para se acalmar e se purificar. Quando você usa este movimento, você pode encerrar um efeito em si mesmo que esteja causando as condições enfeitiçado, amedrontado, paralisado, envenenado, recuado ou atordoado.

description.en: From the air you slash into and through the target. If you can be airborne this turn, make a melee attack with advantage doing 1d6+MOVE flying damage.
description.pt: Do ar, você corta e atravessa o alvo. Se você puder estar no ar neste turno, faça um ataque corpo a corpo com vantagem causando 1d6 + MOVE de dano voador.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d6 at level 5, 3d6 at level 11, and 4d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d6 no nível 5, 3d6 no nível 11 e 4d6 no nível 17.

description.en: You politely let your ally take the initiative. Choose a willing creature that you can see within range. Until the spell ends, the target's speed is doubled, it gains a +2 bonus to AC, it has advantage on Dexterity saving throws, and gains an additional action on each of its turns. That action can only be used to take the Dash, Disengage, Hide or Use an Object action. When this move ends, the target can't move or take actions until after its next turn.
description.pt: Você educadamente deixa seu aliado tomar a iniciativa. Escolha uma criatura voluntária que você possa ver dentro do alcance. Até o feitiço terminar, o deslocamento do alvo é dobrado, ele ganha um bônus de +2 na CA, tem vantagem em testes de resistência de Destreza e ganha uma ação adicional em cada um de seus turnos. Essa ação só pode ser usada para realizar a ação de Disparar, Desengajar, Esconder ou Usar um Objeto. Quando este movimento termina, o alvo não pode se mover ou realizar ações até depois do seu próximo turno.

description.en: You hone in on your abilities and feel a surge of speed course through your veins. As long as you have the type, increase your walking, flying, or swimming speed by 20 feet for the duration. You can only increase each type of your speed by 20 feet total with this move.
description.pt: Você aprimora suas habilidades e sente uma onda de velocidade percorrer suas veias. Enquanto você tiver o tipo, aumente seu deslocamento de caminhada, voo ou natação em 20 pés pela duração. Você só pode aumentar cada tipo de deslocamento em 20 pés no total com este movimento.

description.en: You send a razor sharp slice of air towards your opponent. Make a ranged attack roll against an opponent dealing 1d6 + MOVE flying damage on a hit. This move crits on a natural roll of 19 or 20.
description.pt: Você envia uma fatia de ar afiada como navalha em direção ao seu oponente. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância contra um oponente causando 1d6 + MOVE de dano voador em um acerto. Este movimento causa um acerto crítico em uma rolagem natural de 19 ou 20.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d6 at level 5, 3d6 at level 11, and 4d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d6 no nível 5, 3d6 no nível 11 e 4d6 no nível 17.

description.en: You conjure up a powerful slice of compacted air and hurl it at an enemy Pokémon. Make a ranged attack roll, doing 1d8 + MOVE flying damage on a successful hit. If the natural roll for this attack is 18 or higher, the target becomes flinched.
description.pt: Você conjura uma fatia poderosa de ar compactado e a lança contra um Pokémon inimigo. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância, causando 1d8 + MOVE de dano voador em um acerto bem-sucedido. Se a rolagem natural para este ataque for 18 ou superior, o alvo fica recuado.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d8 at level 5, 3d8 at level 11, and 4d8 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d8 no nível 5, 3d8 no nível 11 e 4d8 no nível 17.

description.en: You use your psychic abilities to teleport yourself and an ally. Pick one willing creature within range. You and that creature swap positions. If either you or your target is too large to fit in their new spot, this move does nothing.
description.pt: Você usa suas habilidades psíquicas para teletransportar a si mesmo e a um aliado. Escolha uma criatura voluntária dentro do alcance. Você e essa criatura trocam de posição. Se você ou seu alvo forem grandes demais para caber no novo lugar, este movimento não faz nada.

description.en: Your mind elevates to a new level of focus. Add +5 to any saving throw you make for the duration, but select one of your other moves. You forget that move and cannot use it for the duration. You cannot have the bonus from amnesia more than once.
description.pt: Sua mente se eleva a um novo nível de foco. Adicione +5 a qualquer teste de resistência que você fizer pela duração, mas selecione um de seus outros movimentos. Você esquece esse movimento e não pode usá-lo pela duração. Você não pode ter o bônus de amnésia mais de uma vez.

description.en: You fire an anchor attached to a chain straight at your opponent. Make a ranged attack roll at your opponent, dealing 1d10 steel damage on a hit. If you hit this attack you may choose immediately pull your target up to 10 feet towards yourself.
description.pt: Você dispara uma âncora presa a uma corrente direto no seu oponente. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância no seu oponente, causando 1d10 de dano de aço em um acerto. Se acertar este ataque, você pode escolher puxar imediatamente seu alvo até 10 pés em sua direção.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d10 at level 5, 3d10 at level 11, and 4d10 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d10 no nível 5, 3d10 no nível 11 e 4d10 no nível 17.

description.en: You levitate a pile of earth and crush an enemy Pokémon with it. Make a ranged attack roll, doing 1d8 + MOVE rock damage on a successful hit.
description.pt: Você levita uma pilha de terra e esmaga um Pokémon inimigo com ela. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância, causando 1d8 + MOVE de dano de pedra em um acerto bem-sucedido.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d8 at level 5, 3d8 at level 11, and 4d8 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d8 no nível 5, 3d8 no nível 11 e 4d8 no nível 17.

description.en: You surround yourself in a stream of water which lets you speed through battle. You may move up to your speed and make a melee attack. On a hit, the Pokémon takes 1d4 + MOVE water damage.
description.pt: Você se cerca de um fluxo de água que permite que você acelere pela batalha. Você pode se mover até o seu deslocamento e fazer um ataque corpo a corpo. Em um acerto, o Pokémon sofre 1d4 + MOVE de dano de água.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 1d6 at level 5, 1d10 at level 11, and 2d8 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d6 no nível 5, 1d10 no nível 11 e 2d8 no nível 17.

description.en: Rings of healing water surround you. While the rings exist, you heal 1d4 + MOVE each turn at the end of your turn.
description.pt: Anéis de água curativa cercam você. Enquanto os anéis existirem, você cura 1d4 + MOVE a cada turno no final do seu turno.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 1d6 at level 5, 1d8 at level 11, and 1d10 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d6 no nível 5, 1d8 no nível 11 e 1d10 no nível 17.

description.en: You surround your tail with a whirling current and slam it into our foe. Make a melee attack roll against an opponent, dealing 1d10 + MOVE water damage on a hit.
description.pt: Você envolve sua cauda com uma corrente rodopiante e a bate em nosso inimigo. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo contra um oponente, causando 1d10 + MOVE de dano de água em um acerto.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d10 at level 5, 3d10 at level 11, and 4d10 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d10 no nível 5, 3d10 no nível 11 e 4d10 no nível 17.

description.en: You thrust out an open hand and unleash relentless strikes against a Pokémon. Make a melee attack roll, doing 1d6 + MOVE on a hit. After successfully hitting a target, roll a d4. On a result of 3 or 4, you may immediately hit again for an additional 1d6 normal damage. Continue this process until you fail to roll a 3 or 4 on the d4 roll.
description.pt: Você empurra uma mão aberta e desfere golpes implacáveis contra um Pokémon. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo, causando 1d6 + MOVE em um acerto. Após atingir com sucesso um alvo, role um d4. Em um resultado de 3 ou 4, você pode atingir imediatamente novamente para um dano normal adicional de 1d6. Continue este processo até falhar em rolar um 3 ou 4 na rolagem do d4.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 1d8 at level 5, 1d10 at level 11, and 1d12 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d8 no nível 5, 1d10 no nível 11 e 1d12 no nível 17.

description.en: A sweet refreshing wind gently blows. This Pokémon makes a medicine check. If the result of the check is higher than the DC to remove a status effect on any creature within 60 feet (line of sight) from the caster, the effect is removed. If there is no DC to remove the status effect, the effective DC is 15.
description.pt: Um vento doce e refrescante sopra suavemente. Este Pokémon faz um teste de Medicina. Se o resultado do teste for superior à CD para remover um efeito de status em qualquer criatura a até 60 pés (linha de visão) do conjurador, o efeito é removido. Se não houver CD para remover o efeito de status, a CD efetiva é 15.

description.en: You exude a sweet perfume, bolstering your ally's resolve. For the duration of this move whenever you or a friendly creature within 20 feet of you makes a saving throw, the creature gains a bonus to the saving throw equal to your Charisma modifier (with a minimum bonus of +1).
description.pt: Você exala um perfume doce, reforçando a determinação de seu aliado. Pela duração deste movimento, sempre que você ou uma criatura amigável a até 20 pés de você fizer um teste de resistência, a criatura ganha um bônus no teste de resistência igual ao seu modificador de Carisma (com um bônus mínimo de +1).

description.en: You try to be as helpful as possible. For the duration you can use the help action as a bonus action.
description.pt: Você tenta ser o mais útil possível. Pela duração, você pode usar a ação de ajudar como uma ação bônus.

description.en: You slap your opponent on the back, making sure they know you'll be there for them (when they die, cause you're killing them). Make a melee attack roll against your opponent, dealing 1d6  + MOVE damage on a hit. If you directly damaged your target since the start of your previous turn, you have advantage on the attack roll.
description.pt: Você dá um tapa nas costas do seu oponente, certificando-se de que ele saiba que você estará lá para ele (quando ele morrer, porque você está matando-o). Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo contra seu oponente, causando 1d6 + MOVE de dano em um acerto. Se você causou dano diretamente ao seu alvo desde o início do seu turno anterior, você tem vantagem na jogada de ataque.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d6 at level 5, 3d6 at level 11, and 4d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d6 no nível 5, 3d6 no nível 11 e 4d6 no nível 17.

description.en: You make a face or feint a movement. If the target can see you, it must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or take 1d4 ghost damage and become flinched.
description.pt: Você faz uma careta ou finge um movimento. Se o alvo puder ver você, ele deve ter sucesso em um teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou sofrer 1d4 de dano fantasma e ficar recuado.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d4 at level 5, 3d4 at level 11, and 4d4 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d4 no nível 5, 3d4 no nível 11 e 4d4 no nível 17.

description.en: You send out your swarm in a vicious biting, stinging attack. Make a ranged attack roll, dealing 1d10 bug damage on a hit. This move lands a critical hit on an attack roll of 19 or 20.
description.pt: Você envia seu enxame em um ataque vicioso de mordidas e picadas. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância, causando 1d10 de dano de inseto em um acerto. Este movimento causa um acerto crítico em uma jogada de ataque de 19 ou 20.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d10 at level 5, 3d10 at level 11, and 4d10 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d10 no nível 5, 3d10 no nível 11 e 4d10 no nível 17.

description.en: You are the cutest. One creature of a gender different than yours within range must succeed Charisma saving throw or be charmed for the duration, or until you or your companions do anything harmful to it.
description.pt: Você é a coisa mais fofa. Uma criatura de gênero diferente do seu dentro do alcance deve ter sucesso em um teste de resistência de Carisma ou ficarará enfeitiçada pela duração, ou até que você ou seus companheiros façam qualquer coisa prejudicial a ela.

description.en: You gather your spirit in a compact ball of energy and fire it at an enemy. Make a ranged attack roll with advantage, doing 1d12 + MOVE fighting damage on a successful hit.
description.pt: Você reúne seu espírito em uma bola compacta de energia e a dispara contra um inimigo. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância com vantagem, causando 1d12 + MOVE de dano lutador em um acerto bem-sucedido.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d12 at level 5, 3d12 at level 11, and 4d12 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d12 no nível 5, 3d12 no nível 11 e 4d12 no nível 17.

description.en: You create a 60-foot long, 5-foot wide line of glowing but freezing cold light. Any creature caught in the line must make a dexterity saving throw, taking 2d6 ice damage on a failure or half as much on a success. If a creature fails the saving throw by 10 or more, it becomes frozen.
description.pt: Você cria uma linha de 60 pés de comprimento e 5 pés de largura de luz brilhante, mas congelante. Qualquer criatura pega na linha deve fazer um teste de resistência de destreza, sofrendo 2d6 de dano de gelo em uma falha ou metade disso em um sucesso. Se uma criatura falhar no teste de resistência por 10 ou mais, ela fica congelada.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 4d6 at level 5, 6d6 at level 11, and 8d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 4d6 no nível 5, 6d6 no nível 11 e 8d6 no nível 17.

description.en: You surround yourself with a dancing veil of rainbow lights. You gain 5 temporary hit points for the duration. If a creature hits you with a melee attack while you have those temporary hit points, the creature takes 5 ice damage.
description.pt: Você se cerca com um véu dançante de luzes coloridas. Você ganha 5 pontos de vida temporários pela duração. Se uma criatura atingir você com um ataque corpo a corpo enquanto você tiver esses pontos de vida temporários, a criatura sofre 5 de dano de gelo.

higherLevels.en: The temporary health and ice damage of this move increase to 15 at level 5, 25 at level 11, and 35 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: A vida temporária e o dano de gelo deste movimento aumentam para 15 no nível 5, 25 no nível 11 e 35 no nível 17.

description.en: You sharpen your mind and feel a surge of power throughout you. As long as you have the type, increase your walking, flying, or swimming speed by 20 feet for the duration. You deal an extra 1d4 on melee attacks for the duration.
description.pt: Você aguça sua mente e sente uma onda de poder através de você. Enquanto você tiver o tipo, aumente seu deslocamento de caminhada, voo ou natação em 20 pés pela duração. Você causa 1d4 adicional em ataques corpo a corpo pela duração.

higherLevels.en: At level 10 the extra damage on your melee attacks increases to 2d4.
higherLevels.pt: No nível 10, o dano extra em seus ataques corpo a corpo aumenta para 2d4.

description.en: You unleash a torrent of ice and snow that was loosened by a violent act. Target a space within range. Draw a line from that space 5 feet wide and 20 feet long. Any creature caught in the line must succeed on a DEX saving throw against your Move DC, taking 2d6 ice damage on a failed save, or half damage on a success. If you are below half HP, those creatures have disadvantage on the saving throw.
description.pt: Você libera uma torrente de gelo e neve que foi afrouxada por um ato violento. Alveje um espaço dentro do alcance. Desenhe uma linha a partir desse espaço com 5 pés de largura e 20 pés de comprimento. Qualquer criatura pega na linha deve ter sucesso em um teste de resistência de DES contra a sua CD de Move, sofrendo 2d6 de dano de gelo em um teste de resistência falho, ou metade do dano em um sucesso. Se você estiver com menos de metade do HP, essas criaturas têm desvantagem no teste de resistência.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 4d6 at level 5, 6d6 at level 11, and 8d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 4d6 no nível 5, 6d6 no nível 11 e 8d6 no nível 17.

description.en: As your opponent strikes out towards you, you give them big puppy-dog eyes. After an attack roll against you is declared but before the roll is made you can use your reaction to cause one enemy to make a Charisma saving throw against you MOVE DC. On a failure that creature has disadvantage on the attack. If that attack hits, you only take half damage.
description.pt: Enquanto seu oponente ataca você, você faz olhos grandes de cachorrinho. Após uma jogada de ataque contra você ser declarada, mas antes da jogada ser feita, você pode usar sua reação para fazer um inimigo realizar um teste de resistência de Carisma contra a sua CD de MOVE. Em uma falha, essa criatura tem desvantagem no ataque. Se esse ataque atingir, você só sofre metade do dano.

description.en: You arm your poison spikes and point them toward your foe. As a reaction when you are targeted by an attack you may increase your AC by +5 until the start of your next turn. You must decide to to use this move before you know if the triggering attack hits. If your attacker is adjacent to you when you use this move and their attack misses, your attacker becomes poisoned.
description.pt: Você arma seus espinhos venenosos e os aponta para seu inimigo. Como uma reação ao ser alvo de um ataque, você pode aumentar sua CA em +5 até o início de seu próximo turno. Você deve decidir usar este movimento antes de saber se o ataque disparador acerta. Se o seu atacante estiver adjacente a você quando você usar este movimento e o ataque dele errar, seu atacante fica envenenado.

description.en: Make a ranged attack on a Pokémon. If you hit, roll 1d4. You attack with a barrage of ranged strikes equal to the number shown. Make a ranged attack roll for each projectile. The projectiles do 1d4 normal damage each on a hit.
description.pt: Faça um ataque à distância em um Pokémon. Se você acertar, role 1d4. Você ataca com uma barragem de golpes à distância igual ao número mostrado. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância para cada projétil. Os projéteis causam 1d4 de dano normal cada em um acerto.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 1d6 at level 5, 1d8 at level 11, and 1d10 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d6 no nível 5, 1d8 no nível 11 e 1d10 no nível 17.

description.en: You create a transparent shield of psychic energy. For the duration, the barrier grants +2 to AC for you and any allies within a 5 foot radius of you.
description.pt: Você cria um escudo transparente de energia psíquica. Pela duração, a barreira concede +2 na CA para você e quaisquer aliados dentro de um raio de 5 pés de você.

description.en: You pass on your energy to another. Choose one target you can touch. You may give your action to the target, losing your action this turn and gaining the target an extra action to use on their turn. You cannot use this move if you have already used your action this turn. Once you use this move your turn ends immediately.
description.pt: Você passa sua energia para outro. Escolha um alvo que você possa tocar. Você pode dar sua ação ao alvo, perdendo sua ação neste turno e concedendo ao alvo uma ação extra para usar no turno dele. Você não pode usar este movimento se já tiver usado sua ação neste turno. Uma vez que você use este movimento, seu turno termina imediatamente.

description.en: You gather a ferocious energy inside your beak, preparing to unleash it in a blast. During the duration, if you are hit by an opponent that is adjacent to you, that opponent becomes burned. As your next turn's action, if you keep your concentration, you unleash your stored energy. Make a range attack roll against one opponent with range, dealing 5d6 +MOVE damage on a hit.
description.pt: Você reúne uma energia feroz dentro do seu bico, preparando-se para liberá-la em uma explosão. Durante a duração, se você for atingido por um oponente que esteja adjacente a você, esse oponente fica queimado. Como a ação do seu próximo turno, se você mantiver sua concentração, você libera sua energia armazenada. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância contra um oponente dentro do alcance, causando 5d6 + MOVE de dano em um acerto.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 8d6 at level 5, 11d6 at level 11, and 14d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 8d6 no nível 5, 11d6 no nível 11 e 14d6 no nível 17.

description.en: You call upon the strength of your allies to gang up on an enemy. Make a melee attack roll against an opponent. On a successful hit you deal 1d4 dark damage per Pokeslot your trainer has access to, then adding your MOVE modifier for additional dark damage. A wild Pokémon does 1d4 dark damage per active ally adjacent to itself up to a maximum of 6d4, then adds their MOVE modifier.
description.pt: Você clama pela força de seus aliados para se unirem contra um inimigo. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo contra um oponente. Em um acerto bem-sucedido, você causa 1d4 de dano sombrio para cada Pokeslot ao qual seu treinador tem acesso, então adicionando seu modificador de MOVE para dano sombrio adicional. Um Pokémon selvagem causa 1d4 de dano sombrio por aliado ativo adjacente a si mesmo até um máximo de 6d4, então adiciona seu modificador de MOVE.

description.en: You release a horrendous belch of digestive gases. Make a ranged attack against an opponent dealing 1d4 + MOVE poison damage on a hit. If you have eaten a berry during this combat, all the damage die for this move become d12s.
description.pt: Você solta um arroto horrendo de gases digestivos. Faça um ataque à distância contra um oponente causando 1d4 + MOVE de dano de veneno em um acerto. Se você tiver comido uma fruta durante este combate, todos os dados de dano para este movimento tornam-se d12s.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d4 at level 5, 3d4 at level 11, and 4d4 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d4 no nível 5, 3d4 no nível 11 e 4d4 no nível 17.

description.en: You begin to beat your stomach and throw yourself into a battle dance. Your next successful attack does 1d6 normal damage to yourself and 2d6 extra normal damage to the target.
description.pt: Você começa a bater em seu estômago e se lança em uma dança de batalha. Seu próximo ataque bem-sucedido causa 1d6 de dano normal a si mesmo e 2d6 de dano normal extra ao alvo.

higherLevels.en: The damage to you and the opponent increases to 2d6 and 4d6 respectively at 5th level, 3d6 and 6d6 at 11th level, and 4d6 and 8d6 at 17th level.
higherLevels.pt: O dano a você e ao oponente aumenta para 2d6 e 4d6 respectivamente no nível 5, 3d6 e 6d6 no nível 11, e 4d6 e 8d6 no nível 17.

description.en: You use your natural affinity for others to assist in battle. For the duration, your friends have advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature within 5 feet of you that is hostile to you.
description.pt: Você usa sua afinidade natural pelos outros para ajudar na batalha. Pela duração, seus amigos têm vantagem em jogadas de ataque corpo a corpo contra qualquer criatura a até 5 pés de você que seja hostil a você.

description.en: You embrace the damage done to you, waiting for your time to strike. You may use your action to activate this move and keep track of all damage done to you before your next turn. On your next turn, you may use your action to lash out an an enemy with a ranged attack, striking them for double the amount of damage you took since your last turn on a successful hit.
description.pt: Você abraça o dano causado a você, esperando sua hora de atacar. Você pode usar sua ação para ativar este movimento e acompanhar todo o dano causado a você antes do seu próximo turno. No seu próximo turno, você pode usar sua ação para atacar um inimigo com um ataque à distância, atingindo-o pelo dobro da quantidade de dano que você sofreu desde o seu último turno em um acerto bem-sucedido.

higherLevels.en: At 11th Level, you can choose to hold Bide for a second turn for the chance to add additional damage to the attack.
higherLevels.pt: No nível 11, você pode escolher manter o Bide por um segundo turno pela chance de adicionar dano adicional ao ataque.

description.en: You attempt to grapple a target into submission. Make a melee attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 1d6 + MOVE normal damage and becomes grappled and restrained. At the beginning of each of its turns, it may attempt to escape with a Strength saving throw against your Move DC. While a Pokémon is grappled by you, you may continue to do an automatic 1d6 + MOVE damage as a bonus action and without using PP.
description.pt: Você tenta agarrar um alvo para submetê-lo. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo. Em um acerto, o alvo sofre 1d6 + MOVE de dano normal e fica agarrado e impedido. No início de cada um dos turnos dele, ele pode tentar escapar com um teste de resistência de Força contra a sua CD de Move. Enquanto um Pokémon estiver agarrado por você, você pode continuar a causar automaticamente 1d6 + MOVE de dano como uma ação bônus e sem usar PP.

higherLevels.en: The base damage increases to 1d12 at level 11.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base aumenta para 1d12 no nível 11.

description.en: You sink your teeth into an enemy Pokémon. Make a melee attack roll, doing 1d6 + MOVE dark damage on a successful hit.
description.pt: Você enterra seus dentes em um Pokémon inimigo. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo, causando 1d6 + MOVE de dano sombrio em um acerto bem-sucedido.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d6 at level 5, 3d6 at level 11, and 4d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d6 no nível 5, 3d6 no nível 11 e 4d6 no nível 17.

description.en: You decimate your foe with a powerful explosion of fire. Make a ranged attack roll doing 8d8 fire damage on a hit. Until the end of your next turn, your movement speed becomes zero and you cannot use damaging moves.
description.pt: Você dizima seu oponente com uma explosão poderosa de fogo. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância causando 8d8 de dano de fogo em um acerto. Até o final do seu próximo turno, sua velocidade de movimento torna-se zero e você não pode usar movimentos de dano.

higherLevels.en: The damage increases to 12d8 at level 11.
higherLevels.pt: O dano aumenta para 12d8 no nível 11.

description.en: You ignite your foot with fire and kick your target. Make a melee attack roll, doing 1d8 + MOVE fire damage on a successful hit. This move crits on a natural roll of 19 or 20. If you hit your target must make a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or become burned.
description.pt: Você incendeia seu pé com fogo e chuta seu alvo. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo, causando 1d8 + MOVE de dano de fogo em um acerto bem-sucedido. Este movimento causa um acerto crítico em uma rolagem natural de 19 ou 20. Se você acertar, seu alvo deve fazer um teste de resistência de Constituição CD 10 ou ficar queimado.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d8 at level 5, 3d8 at level 11, and 4d8 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d8 no nível 5, 3d8 no nível 11 e 4d8 no nível 17.

description.en: Icy clouds form overhead and pelt the ground with hail and snow, centered on a point you choose within range. Each Pokémon within a 10 foot radius must make a Dexterity saving throw against your Move DC, taking 4d6 ice damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.
description.pt: Nuvens geladas se formam acima e bombardeiam o solo com granizo e neve, centradas em um ponto que você escolher dentro do alcance. Cada Pokémon dentro de um raio de 10 pés deve fazer um teste de resistência de Destreza contra a sua CD de Move, sofrendo 4d6 de dano de gelo em um teste de resistência falho, ou metade disso em um acerto bem-sucedido.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 7d6 at level 5, 10d6 at level 11, and 13d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 7d6 no nível 5, 10d6 no nível 11 e 13d6 no nível 17.

description.en: By forcing your body in front of your foe, you stop their movement. Choose one opponent within range to make a Strength saving throw. On a failure they become restrained (though nothing is physically holding them). The target can retry the saving throw at the end of its turn to break the effect.
description.pt: Ao forçar seu corpo na frente de seu inimigo, você para o movimento dele. Escolha um oponente dentro do alcance para fazer um teste de resistência de Força. Em uma falha, ele fica impedido (embora nada o esteja segurando fisicamente). O alvo pode repetir o teste de resistência no final do turno dele para encerrar o efeito.

description.en: You thrust yourself towards an opponent in an attempt to crush them with your physical size. Make a melee attack on a target. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 + MOVE normal damage, and must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or become paralyzed.
description.pt: Você se lança em direção a um oponente em uma tentativa de esmagá-lo com seu tamanho físico. Faça um ataque corpo a corpo em um alvo. Em um acerto, o alvo sofre 1d8 + MOVE de dano normal e deve ter sucesso em um teste de resistência de Constituição CD 12 ou ficar paralisado.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d8 at level 5, 3d8 at level 11, and 4d8 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d8 no nível 5, 3d8 no nível 11 e 4d8 no nível 17.

description.en: You strike a Pokémon with a club of bone. Make a melee attack roll, doing 1d8 + MOVE on a successful hit. If the natural attack roll is 18 or more, the target flinches on their next turn.
description.pt: You strike a Pokémon with a club of bone. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo, doing 1d8 + MOVE Em um acerto bem-sucedido. If the natural attack roll is 18 or more, the target flinches on their next turn.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of the attack increases to 1d10 at level 5, and 1d12 at level 11. The flinch range increases to 17 or more at level 5 and 16 or more at level 11.
higherLevels.pt: The base damage of the attack aumenta para 1d10 at nível 5, and 1d12 at nível 11. The flinch range aumenta para 17 or more at nível 5 and 16 or more at nível 11.

description.en: A spectral bone appears in your hand. You make a series of quick attacks with it before it disappears. Make a melee attack roll, doing 1d6 + MOVE on a hit. After successfully hitting a target, roll a d4. On a result of 3 or 4, you may immediately hit again for an additional 1d6 ground damage. Continue this process until you fail to roll a 3 or 4 on the d4 roll.
description.pt: A spectral bone appears in your hand. You make a series of quick attacks with it before it disappears. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo, doing 1d6 + MOVE Em um acerto. After successfully hitting a target, roll a d4. On a result of 3 or 4, you may immediately hit again for an additional 1d6 dano de terra. Continue this process until you fail to roll a 3 or 4 on the d4 roll.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 1d8 at level 5, 1d10 at level 11, and 1d12 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d8 at nível 5, 1d10 at nível 11, and 1d12 at nível 17.

description.en: You throw a boomerang and make two ranged attacks against a target. On each successful hit you do 1d6 + MOVE ground damage.
description.pt: You throw a boomerang and make two ranged attacks against a target. On each successful hit you do 1d6 + MOVE dano de terra.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 1d8 at level 5, 1d10 at level 11, and 1d12 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d8 at nível 5, 1d10 at nível 11, and 1d12 at nível 17.

description.en: You emit a thunderous wave of sound energy. Each creature in a 60 foot cone makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 3d8 normal damage on a failed save and half damage on a successful one.
description.pt: You emit a thunderous wave of sound energy. Each creature in a 60 foot cone makes a Constituição teste de resistência, sofrendo 3d8 normal de dano Em um teste de resistência falho and half damage Em um sucessoful one.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 5d8 at level 5, 8d8 at level 11, and 10d8 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 5d8 at nível 5, 8d8 at nível 11, and 10d8 at nível 17.

description.en: You leap up into the air and come crashing down on your foe. Choose a target to attack when using this move. During this turn before attacking your opponent you may treat your movement as flying movement. If you end your turn midair and cannot fly, you immediately fall after making the attack. Make a melee attack against the target, dealing 1d8 + MOVE flying damage on a hit.
description.pt: You leap up into the air and come crashing down on your foe. Choose a target to attack when using this move. During this turn before attacking your opponent you may treat your movement as flying movement. If you end your turn midair and cannot fly, you immediately fall after making the attack. Faça um ataque corpo a corpo against the target, causando 1d8 + MOVE flying de dano Em um acerto.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d8 at level 5, 3d8 at level 11, and 4d8 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d8 at nível 5, 3d8 at nível 11, and 4d8 at nível 17.

description.en: You dive bomb the target in an all-out tackle. Make a melee attack doing 1d12 + MOVE on a hit. Until the end of your next turn your movement speed is halved and you cannot fly.
description.pt: You dive bomb the target in an all-out tackle. Faça um ataque corpo a corpo doing 1d12 + MOVE Em um acerto. Until the end of your next turn your movement speed is halved and you cannot fly.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d12 at level 5, 3d12 at level 11, and 4d12 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d12 at nível 5, 3d12 at nível 11, and 4d12 at nível 17.

description.en: You strike precisely with the side of your open hand. Make a melee attack against a Pokémon, doing 1d8 + MOVE fighting damage on a hit. This move destroys barriers defending the target Pokémon such as Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil.
description.pt: You strike precisely with the side of your open hand. Faça um ataque corpo a corpo against a Pokémon, doing 1d8 + MOVE dano lutador Em um acerto. This move destroys barriers defending the target Pokémon such as Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d8 at level 5, 3d8 at level 11, and 4d8 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d8 at nível 5, 3d8 at nível 11, and 4d8 at nível 17.

description.en: You control the water around your opponent and have them stew in the turbulent waters. Make a ranged attack roll against your opponent dealing 1d6 + MOVE damage on a hit. If your opponent took water type damage since the start of your last turn this move does an additional 1d6 water damage.
description.pt: You control the water around your opponent and have them stew in the turbulent waters. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância against your opponent causando 1d6 + MOVE de dano Em um acerto. If your opponent took water type damage since the start of your last turn this move does an additional 1d6 dano de água.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d6 at level 5, 3d6 at level 11, and 4d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d6 at nível 5, 3d6 at nível 11, and 4d6 at nível 17.

description.en: You swing your outstretched arms in a brutal circle around yourself. Make a single melee attack roll. That attack targets each creature of your choice within melee range of you. Each creature hit takes 1d8 + MOVE dark damage.
description.pt: You swing your outstretched arms in a brutal circle around yourself. Make a single melee attack roll. That attack targets each creature of your choice within melee range of you. Each creature hit takes 1d8 + MOVE dano sombrio.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d8 at level 5, 3d8 at level 11, and 4d8 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d8 at nível 5, 3d8 at nível 11, and 4d8 at nível 17.

description.en: You shoot a series of quickly moving bubbles at a target. Make three ranges attacks, doing 1d4 water damage on each successful hit.
description.pt: You shoot a series of quickly moving bubbles at a target. Make three ranges attacks, doing 1d4 dano de água on each successful hit.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 1d6 at level 5, 1d8 at level 11, and 1d12 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d6 at nível 5, 1d8 at nível 11, and 1d12 at nível 17.

description.en: You shoot a concentrated stream of bubbles in an 80-foot line, 5 feet wide. Any Pokémon caught in the line must succeed on a DEX save against your Move DC, taking 3d6 water damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.
description.pt: You shoot a concentrated stream of bubbles in an 80-foot line, 5 pés wide. Any Pokémon caught in the line must succeed on a DEX save contra a sua CD de MOVE, sofrendo 3d6 water de dano Em um teste de resistência falho, or half as much Em um sucessoful one.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 5d6 at level 5, 7d6 at level 11, and 9d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 5d6 at nível 5, 7d6 at nível 11, and 9d6 at nível 17.

description.en: You attack with fangs, mandibles, or the like. Make a melee attack roll against an opponent, dealing 1d6 + MOVE bug damage on a hit. If your opponent is holding a berry, you immediately consume that berry and gain its benefits.
description.pt: You attack with fangs, mandibles, or the like. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo against an opponent, causando 1d6 + MOVE bug de dano Em um acerto. If your opponent is holding a berry, you immediately consume that berry and gain its benefits.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d6 at level 5, 3d6 at level 11, and 4d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d6 at nível 5, 3d6 at nível 11, and 4d6 at nível 17.

description.en: You create series of powerful and horrifying buzzing noises. Choose a number of targets equal to your MOVE modifier (minimum one) within 30 feet of you. Each target must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 2d6 damage on a failed save and half damage on a success.
description.pt: You create series of powerful and horrifying buzzing noises. Choose a number of targets equal to your MOVE modifier (minimum one) within 30 pés of you. Each target must make a Constituição teste de resistência, sofrendo 2d6 de dano Em um teste de resistência falho and half damage Em um sucesso.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 5d6 at level 5, 7d6 at level 11, and 10d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 5d6 at nível 5, 7d6 at nível 11, and 10d6 at nível 17.

description.en: You concentrate on your physical form and flex. You can use this move to either give yourself advantage on your next attack roll this turn, or take the dodge action.
description.pt: You concentrate on your physical form and flex. You can use this move to either give yourself advantage on your next attack roll this turn, or take the dodge ação.

description.en: You create tremors in the ground in a 20-rfoot square originating from yourself. All Pokémon in that area make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d4 damage on a failed save and half damage on a success.
description.pt: You create tremors in the ground in a 20-rfoot square originating from yourself. All Pokémon in that area make a Destreza teste de resistência, sofrendo 2d4 de dano Em um teste de resistência falho and half damage Em um sucesso.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 3d4 at level 5, 5d4 at level 11, and 6d4 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 3d4 at nível 5, 5d4 at nível 11, and 6d4 at nível 17.

description.en: You harden your fist and strike out quickly. Make a melee attack. On a hit, the Pokémon takes 1d4 + MOVE steel damage.
description.pt: You harden your fist and strike out quickly. Faça um ataque corpo a corpo. Em um acerto, o Pokémon sofre 1d4 + MOVE dano de aço.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 1d6 at level 5, 1d10 at level 11, and 2d8 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d6 at nível 5, 1d10 at nível 11, and 2d8 at nível 17.

description.en: You shoot a series of heavy seeds at the opponent. Make a ranged attack roll, doing 1d6 + MOVE on a hit. After successfully hitting a target, roll a d4. On a result of 3 or 4, you may immediately hit again for an additional 1d6 normal damage. Continue this process until you fail to roll a 3 or 4 on the d4 roll.
description.pt: You shoot a series of heavy seeds at the opponent. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância, doing 1d6 + MOVE Em um acerto. After successfully hitting a target, roll a d4. On a result of 3 or 4, you may immediately hit again for an additional 1d6 dano normal. Continue this process until you fail to roll a 3 or 4 on the d4 roll.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 1d8 at level 5, 1d10 at level 11, and 1d12 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d8 at nível 5, 1d10 at nível 11, and 1d12 at nível 17.

description.en: You inflict massive damage by burning your fire essence. Each creature in a 60-foot long, 5-foot wide line originating from yourself must make a dexterity saving throw taking 4d6 fire damage on a failure and half as much on a success. After you use this move you lose all resistances and vulnerabilities from your fire typing until the end of your next turn.
description.pt: You inflict massive damage by burning your fire essence. Each creature in a 60-foot long, 5-foot wide line originating from yourself must make a Destreza teste de resistência sofrendo 4d6 fire de dano Em uma falha and half as much Em um sucesso. After you use this move you lose all resistances and vulnerabilities from your fire typing until the end of your next turn.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 7d6 at level 5, 10d6 at level 11, and 13d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 7d6 at nível 5, 10d6 at nível 11, and 13d6 at nível 17.

description.en: You take a moment to steady your will. Until the end of your next turn, you have advantage on saving throws and enemies have disadvantage on saving throws you cause them to make.
description.pt: You take a moment to steady your will. Until the end of your next turn, you have advantage on teste de resistências and enemies have disadvantage on teste de resistências you cause them to make.

description.en: You use your natural abilities to blend in with your environment. Choose one type of a Pokémon within range. You gain resistance to that type for the duration of this move.
description.pt: You use your natural abilities to blend in with your environment. Choose one type of a Pokémon dentro do alcance. You gain resistance to that type for the duração of this move.

description.en: You draw the attention of the crowd with your spectacular moves. Target one creature within range to make a Wisdom saving throw against your MOVE DC. On a failure they can't use a move that targets creatures other than you for the duration. A creature that fails this saving throw can repeat the save at the end of their turn to end the effects of this move.
description.pt: You draw the attention of the crowd with your spectacular moves. Target one creature dentro do alcance to make a Sabedoria teste de resistência contra a sua CD de MOVE. Em uma falha they can't use a move that targets creatures other than you for the duração. A creature that fails this teste de resistência can repeat the save at the end of their turn to end the effects of this move.

higherLevels.en: At level 5 you may target one more creature with this move. At level 11 you can target 3 total creatures and at level 17 you can target 4 total creatures.
higherLevels.pt: At nível 5 you may target one more creature with this move. At nível 11 you can target 3 total creatures and at nível 17 you can target 4 total creatures.

description.en: You do a little dance. If you want, you can do 1 damage or heal 1 damage to any creature whose exact location you know.
description.pt: You do a little dance. If you want, you can do 1 damage or heal 1 damage to any creature whose exact location you know.

description.en: You take time to concentrate the electricity that is a part of your being. Your next attack that does electric damage does maximum damage.
description.pt: You take time to concentrate the electricity that is a part of your being. Your next attack that does dano elétrico does maximum damage.

description.en: You fire a bolt of electricity at your opponent, trying to capture some of the energy for yourself. Make a ranged attack roll against an opponent, dealing 1d6 + MOVE electric damage on a hit. If you roll a 19 or 20 while attacking with this move your next attack that does electric damage does maximum damage.
description.pt: You fire a bolt of electricity at your opponent, trying to capture some of the energy for yourself. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância against an opponent, causando 1d6 + MOVE electric de dano Em um acerto. If you roll a 19 or 20 while attacking with this move your next attack that does dano elétrico does maximum damage.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d6 at level 5, 3d6 at level 11, and 4d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d6 at nível 5, 3d6 at nível 11, and 4d6 at nível 17.

description.en: You act as charming as possible. Choose one creature within range that is not hostile towards you. For the duration you and your trainer have advantage on all Charisma checks directed at that creature.
description.pt: You act as charming as possible. Choose one creature dentro do alcance that is not hostile towards you. For the duração you and your trainer have advantage on all Carisma checks directed at that creature.

description.en: You chatter incessantly to annoy and insult your enemy. Choose a creature you can see. If it can hear you, it must pass a Wisdom save or take 1d6 + MOVE flying damage and have disadvantage on its next attack roll before the end of its next turn.
description.pt: You chatter incessantly to annoy and insult your enemy. Choose a creature you can see. If it can hear you, it must pass a Sabedoria save or take 1d6 + MOVE dano voador and have disadvantage on its next attack roll before the end of its next turn.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d6 at level 5, 3d6 at level 11, and 4d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d6 at nível 5, 3d6 at nível 11, and 4d6 at nível 17.

description.en: You strike your opponent, aiming to pierce their defenses. Make a melee attack roll against your opponent, dealing 1d8 + MOVE damage on a hit. You cannot have disadvantage on this attack.
description.pt: You strike your opponent, aiming to pierce their defenses. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo against your opponent, causando 1d8 + MOVE de dano Em um acerto. You cannot have disadvantage on this attack.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d8 at level 5, 3d8 at level 11, and 4d8 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d8 at nível 5, 3d8 at nível 11, and 4d8 at nível 17.

description.en: You take hold of the opponent, spin them around you and toss them away. The target makes a Strength saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 1d8 + MOVE fighting damage. Additionally, if the target is no more than one size larger then the user, the target is pushed 10 feet in a direction of your choice and is knocked prone.
description.pt: You take hold of the opponent, spin them around you and toss them away. The target makes a Força teste de resistência. Em uma falha, o alvo sofre 1d8 + MOVE dano lutador. Additionally, if the target is no more than one size larger then the user, the target is pushed 10 pés in a direction of your choice and is knocked prone.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 1d12 at level 5, 2d8 at level 11, and 2d12 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d12 at nível 5, 2d8 at nível 11, and 2d12 at nível 17.

description.en: You clamp down on an enemy, attempting keep them in place and deal massive damage. Make a melee attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 1d6 + MOVE water damage and is grappled and restrained (with escape DC equal to your MOVE DC). While you are grappling a creature in this way, you may spend your action to attack that creature again with this move without spending an additional PP.

description.en: A line of strong wind 60 feet long and 10 feet wide blasts from you in a direction you choose for the spell's duration. Each creature that starts its turn in the line must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pushed 15 feet away from you in a direction following the line. Any creature in the line must spend 2 feet of movement for every 1 foot it moves when moving closer to you.The gust disperses gas or vapor, and it extinguishes candles, torches, and similar unprotected flames in the area. It causes protected flames, such as those of lanterns, to dance wildly and has a 50 percent chance to extinguish them. As a bonus action on each of your turns before the spell ends, you can change the direction in which the line blasts from you. This move removes hazards from the field.

description.en: You reach out to slap a Pokémon with quick strikes. Make a melee attack roll, doing 1d6 + MOVE normal on a hit. After successfully hitting a target, roll a d4. On a result of 3 or 4, you may immediately hit again for an additional 1d6 normal damage. Continue this process until you fail to roll a 3 or 4 on the d4 roll.

description.en: You create a duplicate image of yourself which shifts around your form. The image copies every move you make. When an enemy hits you with an attack, roll a d4. On a 3 or 4, the image takes all the damage for you and disappears.

It takes 1d12 dragon damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

description.en: A beam of crackling, purple lifeforce lances out toward a creature within range, forming a sustained arc of energy between you and the target. This move ends if you use your action to do anything else. The move also ends if the target is ever outside the spell's range or if it has total cover from you.

description.en: By focus your psychic abilities you receive an omen about the results of a specific course of action that you plan to take within the next 30 minutes. The DM chooses from the following possible omens. • Weal, for good results • Woe, for bad results • Weal and woe, for both good and bad results • Nothing, for results that aren't especially good or bad This move doesn't take into account any possible circumstances that might change the outcome, such as the use of addition moves or the loss or gain of a companion. If you use this move two or more times before completing your next Long Rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each use after the first that you get a random reading. The DM makes this roll in secret.

Once this move heals a total amount of hit points equal to 3 times your level, the effect ends.

description.en: This move reverses gravity in a 50-foot-radius, 100-foot high Cylinder centered on a point within range. All creatures and Objects that aren't somehow anchored to the ground in the area fall upward and reach the top of the area when you cast this spell. A creature can make a Dexterity saving throw against you MOVE DC to grab onto a fixed object it can reach, thus avoiding the fall. If some solid object (such as a ceiling) is encountered in this fall, falling objects and creatures strike it just as they would during a normal downward fall. If an object or creature reaches the top of the area without striking anything, it remains there, oscillating slightly, for the Duration. At the end of the Duration, affected objects and creatures fall back down.

description.en: The target's size doubles in all dimensions, and its weight is multiplied by eight. This growth increases its size by one category - from Medium to Large, for example. If there isn't enough room for the target to double its size, the creature or object attains the maximum possible size in the space available. Until the spell ends, the target also has advantage on Strength Checks and Strength saving throws. The targets' attacks with any enlarged appendage deal 1d4 extra damage.

On a failure, that Pokémon loses all PP from the move that killed or knocked you out. You must choose to use Grudge before the damage total from the attacking move is known.

description.en: Until the spell ends, hail and sleet fall in a 40-foot-tall cylinder with a 40-foot radius centered on a point you choose within range. Exposed flames in the area are doused. The ground becomes difficult terrain. When a creature enters the area for the first time or starts its turn there, it must make a Dexterity save against your MOVE DC. On a failure, it falls prone. If a creature is concentrating in the area where the hail storm appears when this move is used, it must make a Constitution save to maintain its concentration. description.en: You make your last wish one of restoration. You may choose one ally within range to regain up to half of its HP. If you wish you may instead choose one Pokémon currently in your trainer's possession to regain up to half of its HP, whether or not they are within range. If you choose such such a Pokémon and that Pokémon could be switched with yourself, your trainer may take the switch action to do so as part of this move. Right after using this move, you faint.
description.pt: You make your last wish one of restoration. You may choose one ally dentro do alcance to regain up to half of its HP. If you wish you may instead choose one Pokémon currently in your trainer's possession to regain up to half of its HP, whether or not they are dentro do alcance. If you choose such such a Pokémon and that Pokémon could be switched with yourself, your trainer may take the switch ação to do so as part of this move. Right after using this move, you faint.

description.en: You slap your opponent with heart shaped smack. Make a melee attack roll, doing 1d6 psychic damage on a hit. On a natural roll of 19 or 20, the target is flinched.
description.pt: You slap your opponent with heart shaped smack. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo, doing 1d6 dano psíquico Em um acerto. On a natural roll of 19 or 20, the target is flinched.

description.en: You surround yourself in flame and crash into your opponent. Make a melee attack against your opponent, dealing 1d12 + MOVE fire damage on a hit. You may move up to 10 additional feet before making this attack. If you weight significantly more then your opponent (as determined by your DM) you have advantage on the attack.
description.pt: You surround yourself in flame and crash into your opponent. Faça um ataque corpo a corpo against your opponent, causando 1d12 + MOVE fire de dano Em um acerto. You may move up to 10 additional pés before making this attack. If you weight significantly more then your opponent (as determined by your DM) you have advantage on the attack.

description.en: You conjure up a wave of heat that washes over an area within range. The area can be up to 30 feet long, up to 10 feet wide, and up to 10 feet tall. Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 2d8 fire damage and is knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half as much damage and isn’t knocked prone. The heat then spreads out across the ground in all directions, igniting flames in its area and within 30 feet of it, and then it vanishes.
description.pt: You conjure up a wave of heat that washes over an area dentro do alcance. The area can be up to 30 pés long, up to 10 pés wide, and up to 10 pés tall. Each creature in that area must make a Destreza teste de resistência. Em uma falha, a creature takes 2d8 dano de fogo and is knocked prone. Em um sucesso, a creature takes half as much damage and isn’t knocked prone. The heat then spreads out across the ground in all directions, igniting flames in its area and within 30 pés of it, and then it vanishes.

description.en: You use your entire weight to squash the opponent. Make a melee attack roll, dealing 1d6 steel damage on a hit. If you are significantly heavier than your opponent or at least two sizes larger the damage dice for this attack turn into d12s instead.
description.pt: You use your entire weight to squash the opponent. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo, causando 1d6 steel de dano Em um acerto. If you are significantly heavier than your opponent or at least two sizes larger the damage dice for this attack turn into d12s instead.

description.en: You inspire your teammates to do their best. To use this move choose one creature other than yourself within 60 feet of you who can see you. That creature gains one inspiration die, a 1d6. Once within the next 10 minutes, the creature can roll the die and add the number rolled to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw it makes. the creature can wait until after it rolls the d20 before deciding to use the inspiration die, but must decide before the DM says whether the roll succeeds or fails. Once the inspiration die is rolled, it is lost. A creature can have only one inspiration die at a time.
description.pt: You inspire your teammates to do their best. To use this move choose one creature other than yourself within 60 pés of you who can see you. That creature gains one inspiration die, a 1d6. Once within the next 10 minutes, the creature can roll the die and add the number rolled to one ability check, attack roll, or teste de resistência it makes. the creature can wait until after it rolls the d20 before deciding to use the inspiration die, but must decide before the DM says whether the roll succeeds or fails. Once the inspiration die is rolled, it is lost. A creature can have only one inspiration die at a time.

description.en: You place a curse on a creature that you can see within range. Until the spell ends, you deal an extra 1d6 ghost damage to the target whenever you hit it with an attack. Also, choose one ability when you cast the spell. The target has disadvantage on ability checks made with the chosen ability. If the target drops to 0 hit points before this spell ends, you can use a bonus action on a turn of yours to Hex a new creature.

If the target drops to 0 hit points before this spell ends, you can use a ação bônus on a turn of yours to Hex a new creature.

higherLevels.en: At 8th level you can maintain your concentration on Hex for up to 8 hours. At 15th level you can maintain your concentration on Hex for up to 24 hours.

description.en: You conjure from within yourself power only you have. Make a ranged attack roll against a single opponent, dealing 1d6 + MOVE damage on a hit. The MOVE for this attack is your highest stat. The type of this attack depends on your lowest stat. If your lowest stat is Strength you do fighting damage, Dexterity you do normal damage, Constitution you do poison damage, Intelligence you do psychic damage, Wisdom you do grass damage, Charisma you do fire damage.
description.pt: You conjure from within yourself power only you have. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância against a single opponent, causando 1d6 + MOVE de dano Em um acerto. The MOVE for this attack is your highest stat. The type of this attack depends on your lowest stat. If your lowest stat is Força you do dano lutador, Destreza you do dano normal, Constituição you do dano de veneno, Inteligência you do dano psíquico, Sabedoria you do dano de planta, Carisma you do dano de fogo.

description.en: You leap into the air to deliver a strong kick to the enemy. Make a melee attack against a Pokémon, doing 1d12 + MOVE fighting damage on a hit. On a miss, you fly past your opponent and slam hard into the ground. If you do miss, you move at half speed, cannot take reactions, and have disadvantage on the attack rolls of High Jump Kick. Each of those negative effects last until the end of your next turn.

description.en: You don't quite give your all on this strike. Make a melee attack dealing 1d6 + MOVE normal damage on a success. You cannot reduce a Pokémon to less then 1 hit point with this attack.

name: Hold Hands
duration: 1 hour or until it gets uncomfortable

description.en: You hold hands with an ally. So cute! If you want, you can use your movement on their turn instead of your own. I mean, only if you want to. No pressure.
description.pt: You hold hands with an ally. So cute! If you want, you can use your movement on their turn instead of your own. I mean, only if you want to. No pressure.

description.en: You sharpen your claws against one another. The next time you attack with your claws you have advantage and deal an extra 1d6 damage.

description.en: You let loose a furious howl, calling your companions into battle. Choose up to four creatures within a 30 foot sphere, centered on yourself. Each of those creatures has advantage on their next attack.
description.pt: You let loose a furious howl, calling your companions into battle. Choose up to four creatures within a 30 foot sphere, centered on yourself. Each of those creatures has advantage on their next attack.

description.en: You conjure an spiraling cylinder of wind in range, which has a 20 foot radius and 40 foot height. This cylinder becomes difficult terrain for the duration, even for flying creatures. When a creature enters the spell’s area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it is buffeted by high winds and it must make a Dexterity saving throw against your Move DC. If it fails, it takes 4d6 flying damage on a failed save, and half as much on a successful one. If a creature rolls a natural 1 on the save, they become confused. On each of your turns after you cast this spell, you can use an action to move the storm 30 feet in any direction.

Only one Pokémon can be infested by you at a time.

Your target must make a Constitution saving throw against your MOVE DC or take steel damage equal to half of the damage you took.

description.en: You send a chilling, spectral wind through your opponents. Choose a point within range. Each creature within a 30 foot cube centered on that point must make a Constitution saving throw or take 3d6 ghost damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful save. If you roll maximum damage on any of the damage die for this attack any creatures who failed their saving throw also become frightened of you for 1 minute. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to being frightened by your Ominous Wind for 24 hours.

Affected creatures may take non-aggressive actions on their turn at their leisure.

description.en: You roll yourself into a ball and, like a wheel, slam into your opponent. You may move up to 10 feet and then make a melee attack roll dealing 1d4 + MOVE rock damage. For each Rollout move you've used consecutively since the first time you used Rollout, this move does an extra 1d4 damage. For example if this is the third time you've used Rollout in a row, the move does two extra 1d4.

description.en: You take some time to rest your wings and recover. You recover 1d8 + MOVE HP. You cannot fly or move during the turn you use Roost.

description.en: You send out a tremor in the ground, tilling it to what you desire. The ground in a 30 foot cone originating from yourself becomes difficult terrain. For every five feet a creature moves through the terrain it takes 1d4 ground damage. Grass Pokémon are immune to the effects of this move.

description.en: You sing the same powerful verse you have sung. Make a ranged attack roll dealing 1d4 + MOVE normal damage on a hit. For each Round move you have used in a row, you may roll an extra damage die for this move. For example if you have used Round for 4 rounds in a row, you roll 5 damage die.

description.en: You surround yourself with a protective barrier of mystic energy. Each friendly creature (including yourself) with a 10 foot radius circle centered on yourself can add your Charisma modifier to any saving throw they need to perform.
description.pt: You surround yourself with a protective barrier of mystic energy. Each friendly creature (including yourself) with a 10 foot radius circle centered on yourself can add your Carisma modifier to any teste de resistência they need to perform.

description.en: You kick up a cloud of sand in an attempt to blind a target in range. The target must make a constitution saving throw against your Move DC becoming blinded on a failed save. A creature can remove this blindness by retrying the constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns.
description.pt: You kick up a cloud of sand in an attempt to blind a target in range. The target must make a Constituição teste de resistência contra a sua CD de MOVE becoming blinded Em um teste de resistência falho. A creature can remove this blindness by retrying the Constituição teste de resistência at the end of each of its turns.

description.en: You trap an opponent in a vortex of sand. Cause one target to make a Strength saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 1d6 + MOVE ground damage and is restrained. A creature Restrained by this move can use its actions to make a Strength check against your MOVE DC. If it succeeds, it is no longer Restrained. While you are restraining a creature with this move, you may spend your action to attack that creature again with this move without spending an additional PP.
description.pt: You trap an opponent in a vortex of sand. Cause one target to make a Força teste de resistência. Em uma falha, o alvo sofre 1d6 + MOVE dano de terra and is restrained. A creature Restrained by this move can use its açãos to make a Força check contra a sua CD de MOVE. If it succeeds, it is no longer Restrained. While you are restraining a creature with this move, you may spend your ação to attack that creature again with this move without spending an additional PP.

description.en: You create a flurry of sand which stings and obscures. Choose one point within range. The area within a cylinder 40 feet tall with a radius of 40 feet becomes filled with a storm of sand. That area is lightly obscured and ranged attack that must cross the area have disadvantage as it is difficult to navigate the storm. The area of the sandstorm becomes difficult terrain. If a creature is concentrating in the sandstorm when this move is used, it must make a Constitution save to maintain it. Each creature that ends its turns in the sandstorm takes 1d4 rock damage at the end of their turn. Rock, Ground, and Steel type Pokémon are immune to all effects of Sandstorm.
description.pt: You create a flurry of sand which stings and obscures. Choose one point dentro do alcance. description.en: You emit a horrible noise, throwing off your opponents. Choose up to three targets within range. The next attack against each of those creatures has advantage.

description.en: You understand that which no one else knows and use your knowledge to clothe yourself in secrecy. For the duration, you are invisible.

description.en: You imbue a seed with a magic energy before lobbing it to deliver the package. The ground in a 20-foot radius centered on a point within range twists and sprouts hard spikes and thorns. The area becomes difficult terrain for the duration. When a creature moves into or within the area, it takes 2d4 grass damage for every 5 feet it travels. The transformation of the ground is camouflaged to look natural. Any creature that can't see the area at the time the spell is cast must make a Wisdom (Perception) check against your MOVE DC to recognize the terrain as hazardous before entering it.

description.en: You release a massive explosion in a 10 foot radius centered on yourself. Creatures in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw against your Move DC. If your Pokémon has at least half its hit points left, anyone in range takes 8d6 normal damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one. If your Pokémon has less than half of its hit points left, the damage is halved again for both a successful and unsuccessful saving throw. The user is reduced to 0 HP and falls unconscious after using this move.

You can end all these effects early by using an action to enter your shell again.

description.en: You create a psychic link with another creature. Target one other creature to make a Intelligence saving throw against your MOVE DC. On a failed save you can pick one of their abilities to use for yourself (if they have any). You must then allow the creature to use one of your abilities. During this time neither of you can use the ability you traded away. You each can use each others abilities until Skill Swap ends, at which point they return to their original owners.

description.en: You talk and walk in your sleep. If you are asleep you may use Sleep Talk to use one of the other moves you know even though you are incapacitated. That move also loses PP and you carry out all of the actions of that move as normal. If you are not asleep Sleep Talk does nothing.

description.en: You soak in solar energy and prepare to unleash a devastating beam. When you use this move as an action you simply begin to collect energy. However, on your next turn you may use your action to create a 5 feet wide, 120 foot long line of solar energy. Any creature caught in the line must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 6d6 grass damage on a failure or half as much on a success. If this move in used in strong sunlight, such as that created by the move Sunny Day, you can create the line of solar energy on the turn you use this move without have to wait a turn or expend an extra action.

description.en: You shine a spotlight on your star, making them the center of attention. Choose one creature within range. If that creature's foes would attack a creature other then your target while your target is in range of their move, they must make a Wisdom saving throw against your MOVE DC. On a failure they must change the target of their attack to the creature with the Spotlight on them or forfeit their attack.

description.en: You break off a few sharp shards of rock, which begin to levitate around you. You create 3 shards which float around you until you trigger them. When you are hit by an attack you may use your reaction to interpose shards between yourself and the attack. For each shard you use in this way you gain +1 AC versus the triggering attack. Using the shards in this way does not destroy them. On your turn, you can direct the shards to attack an adjacent opponent as a bonus action. Make a single melee attack roll against that opponent. On a hit you deal 1d4+1 points of rock damage for each shard you used to attack. Once a shard damages an opponent in this way, your link with it dissipates and you can no longer control it for this use of Stealth Rock.
description.pt: You break off a few sharp shards of rock, which begin to levitate around you. You create 3 shards which float around you until you trigger them. When you are hit by an attack you may use your reação to interpose shards between yourself and the attack. For each shard you use in this way you gain +1 AC versus the triggering attack. Using the shards in this way does not destroy them. On your turn, you can direct the shards to attack an adjacent opponent as a ação bônus. Make a single melee attack roll against that opponent. Em um acerto you deal 1d4+1 points of dano de pedra for each shard you used to attack. Once a shard damages an opponent in this way, your link with it dissipates and you can no longer control it for this use of Stealth Rock.

Whether you hit or not you move through your opponent, ending up in a space on the opposite side of the target if possible. You do not take opportunity attacks during this movement.
