description.en: You conjure a mass of thick, sticky webbing at a point of your choice within range. The webs fill a 20-foot cube from that point for the duration. The webs are difficult terrain and lightly obscure their area. Webs layered over a flat surface have a depth of 5 feet. Each creature that starts its turn in the webs or that enters them during its turn must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is restrained as long as it remains in the webs or until it breaks free. A creature restrained by the webs can use its actions to make a Strength check against your MOVE DC. If it succeeds, it is no longer Restrained. The webs are flammable. Any 5-foot cube of webs exposed to fire burns away in 1 round, dealing 2d4 fire damage to any creature that starts its turn in the fire.
description.pt: You conjure a mass of thick, sticky webbing at a point of your choice dentro do alcance. The webs fill a 20-foot cube from that point for the duração. The webs are difficult terrain and lightly obscure their area. Webs layered over a flat surface have a depth of 5 pés. Each creature that starts its turn in the webs or that enters them during its turn must make a Destreza teste de resistência. Em um teste de resistência falho, the creature is restrained as long as it remains in the webs or until it breaks free. A creature restrained by the webs can use its açãos to make a Força check contra a sua CD de MOVE. If it succeeds, it is no longer Restrained. The webs are flammable. Any 5-foot cube of webs exposed to fire burns away in 1 round, causando 2d4 fire de dano to any creature that starts its turn in the fire.

description.en: You create in your stomach a stockpile of flem and digested materials. You add a stack of Stockpile to yourself. You can have up to 5 stacks of Stockpile at one time. For each stack of Stockpile you have, you gain +1 AC. When you use Stockpile you gain temporary hit points equal to your level. These temporary hit points are unique and can stack with other temporary hit points from Stockpile. These stacks last for only for the duration of this move and all disappear when the first stack runs out its duration. You may choose to lose all your stacks of Stockpile at any time. If you lose your stacks of stockpile for any reason you lose the AC and temporary hit points from this move.
description.pt: You create in your stomach a stockpile of flem and digested materials. You add a stack of Stockpile to yourself. You can have up to 5 stacks of Stockpile at one time. description.en: You create a duplicate of yourself with one quarter of your HP (rounded down) which appears in your space as you disappear. This substitute has an AC of 1, speed of 0 feet, and takes all damage and status ailments you would normally take until it is destroyed. While the Substitute is in play your disappear into the Ethereal plane, becoming untargetable, and cannot move. You may attack as normal, with the substitute acting as yourself for the purposes of move's ranges. If the damage done is enough to destroy the substitute, you take the remaining damage and reappear in the substitute's place. If a creature ignores the effects of substitute they act as if you are in the space the substitute is in.

The water then spreads out across the ground in all directions, extinguishing unprotected flames in its area and within 30 feet of it, and then it vanishes.

You may move that object up to 30 feet each round in any direction for the duration. If you wish to lift a creature, that creature can make an Intelligence saving throw against your MOVE DC to resist being lifted.

description.en: You use the power of your mind to instantaneously transport to another location. You may teleport to any location within range. It can be a place you can see, one you can visualize, or one you can describe by stating distance and direction, such as “200 feet straight downward” or “upward to the northwest at a 45-degree angle, 300 feet.” You can bring along objects as long as their weight does not exceed what you can carry. You can also bring one willing creature of your size or smaller who is carrying gear up to its carrying capacity. The creature must be within 5 feet of you when you cast this spell. If you would arrive in a place already occupied by an object or a creature, you and any creature traveling with you each take 4d6 force damage, and the spell fails to teleport you.

You can also bring one willing creature of your size or smaller who is carrying gear up to its carrying capacity. The creature must be within 5 pés of you when you cast this spell. When you hit you may choose to steal one small item off you opponent as well as deal damage.

description.en: You tickle an opponent until they laugh uncontrollably. Choose one opponent with range to make a Constitution saving throw against your MOVE DC. On a failure they begin to laugh and find everything funny, falling prone and being incapacitated for as long as the Tickle continues. On each of your turns until the duration of the move is over, you may use your bonus action to continue the Tickle if you are still within range of the target. If you do not continue the Tickle in this way, the effects of Tickle immediately end. Additionally, the target can retry the Constitution saving throw against your MOVE DC every time they take damage, ending the effect on a successful save.

description.en: You turn the whole world upside down. If you fail a saving throw against a move targeted only at yourself you may your reaction to use Topsy-Turvy. If they are in range the creature whose saving throw you failed makes a saving throw against whatever DC you failed, taking whatever effects happen on a success or failure. When they do so you suffer no ill effects of the move which triggered Topsy-Turvy.

description.en: You scatter a field of poisonous burrs across the ground. Choose one 30 foot square within range to be covered by the burrs. Each creature that moves 5 feet or more through the field must make a Constitution saving throw against your MOVE DC or become poisoned. If you have at least two fields of burrs overlapping, any creature that moves at least 5 feet through the overlapping fields suffers an even worse poison. They make a Constitution saving throw against your MOVE DC. On a failure they are poisoned and take double damage from the poison damage each turn. If a Pokémon is already poisoned while they move through the overlapping fields a failed Constitution save results in them exchanging their poisoned condition for this more harmful poison.

On a failed save that target is restrained for the duration and poisoned. A creature restrained by the webs can use its actions to make a Strength check against your MOVE DC. If it succeeds, it is no longer restrained.

description.en: You morph into a near-exact copy of a Pokémon. Target one Pokémon within range. Your ability scores, armor class, movement speed, saving throws, type, skill proficiencies, known moves, PP, status ailments, lasting effects, and abilities become what that Pokémon currently has. You keep your current HP, total HP, and level from your original form.

description.en: You briefly warp space around you. As a reaction to an initiative roll you may use this move to reverse the initiative order for the first round only. This means the creature with the lowest initiative is first and the creature with the highest initiative is last. This will result in having the creature with the highest initiative taking two turns in a row when the initiative order returns to normal at the end of the first round. You must use this move before you know the result of any initiative rolls for this combat, including your own.

description.en: You call upon your allies as you release the essence of water. Make a ranged attack roll against your opponent, dealing 1d6 + MOVE water damage on a hit. If you hit and one of your allies has done damage to your target with either Fire Pledge or Grass Pledge in the past minute, any creature within 10 ft of the target also takes your Water Pledge damage. If the target has been hit by both Fire Pledge and Grass Pledge in the past minute the radius of creatures taking damage increases to 20 ft.
description.pt: You call upon your allies as you release the essence of water. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância against your opponent, causando 1d6 + MOVE water de dano Em um acerto. If you hit and one of your allies has done damage to your target with either Fire Pledge or Grass Pledge in the past minute, any creature within 10 ft of the target also takes your Water Pledge damage. If the target has been hit by both Fire Pledge and Grass Pledge in the past minute the radius of creatures taking damage aumenta para 20 ft.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d6 at level 5, 3d6 at level 11, and 4d6 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d6 at nível 5, 3d6 at nível 11, and 4d6 at nível 17.

description.en: You pulse a ring of water which explodes out in a mystical energy on contact. Make a ranged attack roll against an opponent dealing 1d6 + MOVE water damage on a hit. On a hit your target must make a Wisdom saving throw against you MOVE DC, becoming confused on a failure.
description.pt: You pulse a ring of water which explodes out in a mystical energy on contact. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância against an opponent causando 1d6 + MOVE water de dano Em um acerto. Em um acerto your target must make a Sabedoria teste de resistência against you MOVE DC, becoming confused Em uma falha.

higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d6 at nível 5, 3d6 at nível 11, and 4d6 at nível 17.

description.en: You quickly fire a spray of shurikens made of water at your opponent. Make a ranged attack roll, doing 1d4 + MOVE water damage on a hit. After successfully hitting a target, roll a d4. On a result of 3 or 4, you may immediately hit again for an additional 1d4 water damage. Continue this process until you fail to roll a 3 or 4 on the d4 roll.
description.pt: You quickly fire a spray of shurikens made of water at your opponent. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância, doing 1d4 + MOVE dano de água Em um acerto. After successfully hitting a target, roll a d4. On a result of 3 or 4, you may immediately hit again for an additional 1d4 dano de água. Continue this process until you fail to roll a 3 or 4 on the d4 roll.

higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d6 at nível 5, 1d8 at nível 11, and 1d10 at nível 17.

description.en: You surround an ally in a spout of water. Until the start of your next turn one creature within range has resistance to fire damage. If the creature already had vulnerability to fire damage it instead takes neutral damage when affected by water sport.
description.pt: You surround an ally in a spout of water. Until the start of your next turn one creature dentro do alcance has resistance to dano de fogo. If the creature already had vulnerability to dano de fogo it instead takes neutral damage when affected by water sport.

description.en: Your expel your reserves of water through a blowhole. Each creature in a 45 foot cone originating from yourself makes a Dexterity Saving throw. Those creature takes water damage equal to one third of your current HP on a failed save, or half as much as that on a successful one.
description.pt: Your expel your reserves of water through a blowhole. Each creature in a 45 foot cone originating from yourself makes a Destreza teste de resistência. Those creature takes dano de água equal to one third of your current HP Em um teste de resistência falho, or half as much as that Em um sucessoful one.

description.en: You use a rocket of water equal to the crash of a waterfall to proper yourself upwards in a powerful uppercut. Make a melee attack roll against an opponent dealing 1d10 water damage on a hit. If you hit on a natural roll of 18 or higher, this attack flinches the opponent.
description.pt: You use a rocket of water equal to the crash of a waterfall to proper yourself upwards in a powerful uppercut. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo against an opponent causando 1d10 water de dano Em um acerto. If you hit on a natural roll of 18 or higher, this attack flinches the opponent.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d10 at level 5, 3d10 at level 11, and 4d10 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d10 at nível 5, 3d10 at nível 11, and 4d10 at nível 17.

description.en: You create a ball consisting of the energy of the weather around you. Make a ranged attack roll against an opponent, dealing 1d8 + MOVE damage on a hit. The type of this damage changes with the weather around you. If it is sunny outside the damage type is fire, if it is raining the damage type is water, if it is snowing the damage type is ice, and if the weather has no distinguishing characteristics the damage type is normal.
description.pt: You create a ball consisting of the energy of the weather around you. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância against an opponent, causando 1d8 + MOVE de dano Em um acerto. The type of this damage changes with the weather around you. If it is sunny outside the damage type is fire, if it is raining the damage type is water, if it is snowing the damage type is ice, and if the weather has no distinguishing characteristics the damage type is normal.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d8 at level 5, 3d8 at level 11, and 4d8 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 2d8 at nível 5, 3d8 at nível 11, and 4d8 at nível 17.

description.en: You trap the opponent in a swirling pool of water. Choose an opponent to make a Dexterity saving throw taking 1d6 +MOVE water damage on a failure. A creature Restrained by this move can use its actions to make a Strength check against your MOVE DC. If it succeeds, it is no longer Restrained. While you are restraining a creature with this move, you may spend your action to attack that creature again with this move without spending an additional PP.
description.pt: You trap the opponent in a swirling pool of water. Choose an opponent to make a Destreza teste de resistência sofrendo 1d6 +MOVE water de dano Em uma falha. A creature Restrained by this move can use its açãos to make a Força check contra a sua CD de MOVE. If it succeeds, it is no longer Restrained. While you are restraining a creature with this move, you may spend your ação to attack that creature again with this move without spending an additional PP.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 1d10 at level 5, 2d6 at level 11, and 2d10 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d10 at nível 5, 2d6 at nível 11, and 2d10 at nível 17.

description.en: You create a whirlwind of spinning air around you. Each Pokémon within a 15 foot sphere center on yourself must make a Strength saving throw against your MOVE DC. On a failed save they are pushed 15 feet away from you and take 1d8 normal damage. On a successful saved they are not pushed and take half damage.
description.pt: You create a whirlwind of spinning air around you. Each Pokémon within a 15 foot sphere center on yourself must make a Força teste de resistência contra a sua CD de MOVE. Em um teste de resistência falho they are pushed 15 pés away from you and take 1d8 dano normal. Em um sucessoful saved they are not pushed and take half damage.

higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 1d12 at nível 5, 2d8 at nível 11, and 2d12 at nível 17.

description.en: You spread your arms to defend against a wide reaching move. When you are forced to make a saving throw against an effect that could affect multiple targets you may use Wide Guard as your reaction to give you and each creature of your choice within 5 feet of you advantage on that saving throw. If the triggering effect is damage and you or those creatures you select succeed on the saving throw, you take no damage from the attack as part of Wide Guard no matter the regular effects of the triggering attack.
description.pt: You spread your arms to defend against a wide reaching move. When you are forced to make a teste de resistência against an effect that could affect multiple targets you may use Wide Guard as your reação to give you and each creature of your choice within 5 pés of you advantage on that teste de resistência. If the triggering effect is damage and you or those creatures you select succeed on the teste de resistência, you take no damage from the attack as part of Wide Guard no matter the regular effects of the triggering attack.

description.en: You surround yourself in wildly spastic electric current before laying into your opponent. You may move up to 15 feet then make a melee attack roll, dealing 1d12 + MOVE electric damage on a hit. Using this move tuckers you out. Until the end of your next turn you move at half speed for all your movements.
description.pt: You surround yourself in wildly spastic electric current before laying into your opponent. You may move up to 15 pés then Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo, causando 1d12 + MOVE electric de dano Em um acerto. Using this move tuckers you out. Until the end of your next turn you move at half speed for all your movements.

description.en: You send out a ghostly wisp of flame which enters the foe's body. Make a ranged attack against an opponent, burning them on a hit.
description.pt: You send out a ghostly wisp of flame which enters the foe's body. Faça um ataque à distância against an opponent, burning them Em um acerto.

description.en: You strike out at an enemy Pokémon with your wings and the wind made by them. Make a ranged attack roll, doing 1d6 + MOVE flying damage on a hit.
description.pt: You strike out at an enemy Pokémon with your wings and the wind made by them. Faça uma jogada de ataque à distância, doing 1d6 + MOVE dano voador Em um acerto.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 2d6 at level 5, 3d6 at level 11, and 4d6 at level 17.

description.en: You pray that your dreams will come true. Yeah, me too buddy. Each time you use this move you may choose one of the following effects to happen: one ally within 1 mile regains 3d6 health, one enemy within 200 feet must make a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or take 3d6 non-typed damage, one ally within 200 feet gains +5 AC for 1 minute, or one ally within 200 feet has advantage on all skills checks, ability checks, and attack rolls for 10 minutes. If the effect you choose has a duration, you must concentrate on it for the duration.
description.pt: You pray that your dreams will come true. Yeah, me too buddy. Each time you use this move you may choose one of the following effects to happen: one ally within 1 mile regains 3d6 health, one enemy within 200 pés must make a DC 15 Carisma teste de resistência or take 3d6 non-typed damage, one ally within 200 pés gains +5 AC for 1 minute, or one ally within 200 pés has advantage on all skills checks, ability checks, and attack rolls for 10 minutes. If the effect you choose has a duração, you must concentrate on it for the duração.

description.en: When you are hit by a melee or ranged attack, you can use your reaction to use this move to increase your AC by +3 until the start of your next turn if it would cause that attack to miss.
description.pt: When you are hit by a melee or ranged attack, you can use your reação to use this move to increase your AC by +3 until the start of your next turn if it would cause that attack to miss.

description.en: You conjure a strange room full of symbols and warped imagery. Choose a 30 foot cube originating at a point within range for the pattern to momentarily appear in. Each creature in the area who sees the pattern must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature becomes charmed for the duration. While charmed by this spell, the creature is incapacitated and has a speed of 0. The effect ends for an affected creature if it takes any damage or if someone else uses an action to shake the creature out of its stupor.
description.pt: You conjure a strange room full of symbols and warped imagery. Choose a 30 foot cube originating at a point dentro do alcance for the pattern to momentarily appear in. Each creature in the area who sees the pattern must make a Sabedoria teste de resistência. Em um teste de resistência falho, the creature becomes charmed for the duração. While charmed by this spell, the creature is incapacitated and has a speed of 0. The effect ends for an affected creature if it takes any damage or if someone else uses an ação to shake the creature out of its stupor.

description.en: You bring down your arm in a slow powerful slam, aiming to smash your opponent. Make a melee attack roll against an opponent, dealing 2d12 + MOVE grass damage on a hit. Regardless of if you hit or miss this attack your reckless swing damages you own appendage. Until the end of your next turn you have disadvantage on melee attack rolls, move at half speed, and cannot take reactions.
description.pt: You bring down your arm in a slow powerful slam, aiming to smash your opponent. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo against an opponent, causando 2d12 + MOVE grass de dano Em um acerto. Regardless of if you hit or miss this attack your reckless swing damages you own appendage. Until the end of your next turn you have disadvantage on melee attack rolls, move at half speed, and cannot take reaçãos.

higherLevels.en: The base damage of this attack increases to 4d12 at level 5, 6d12 at level 11, and 8d12 at level 17.
higherLevels.pt: O dano base deste ataque aumenta para 4d12 at nível 5, 6d12 at nível 11, and 8d12 at nível 17.

description.en: You really amp yourself up! For the duration you have +1 to attack rolls and damage for both ranged and melee attacks. You cannot have this bonus from Work Up more then once.
description.pt: You really amp yourself up! For the duração you have +1 to attack rolls and damage for both ranged and melee attacks. You cannot have this bonus from Work Up more then once.

higherLevels.en: At level 7 this bonus increases to +2 and at level 13 this bonus increases to +3.
higherLevels.pt: At nível 7 this bonus aumenta para +2 and at nível 13 this bonus aumenta para +3.

description.en: You plant a seed with a faint odor and odd effect. Choose one creature you can touch to plant the seed on. For the duration the seed prevents the target from falling asleep. The seed is easy to dislodge and the target may do so as a bonus action.
description.pt: You plant a seed with a faint odor and odd effect. Choose one creature you can touch to plant the seed on. For the duração the seed prevents the target from falling asleep. The seed is easy to dislodge and the target may do so as a ação bônus.

description.en: You attempt to grapple a target into submission. Make a melee attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 1d4 + MOVE normal damage and is grappled and restrained by you. At the beginning of each of its turns, it may attempt to escape with a Strength saving throw against your Move DC. While a Pokémon is grappled by you you may continue this move, as a bonus action and without using a PP, to do an automatic 1d4 + MOVE damage.
description.pt: You attempt to grapple a target into submission. Faça uma jogada de ataque corpo a corpo. Em um acerto, o alvo sofre 1d4 + MOVE dano normal and is grappled and restrained by you. At the beginning of each of its turns, it may attempt to escape with a Força teste de resistência contra a sua CD de MOVE. While a Pokémon is grappled by you you may continue this move, as a ação bônus and without using a PP, to do an automatic 1d4 + MOVE damage.

description.en: You squeeze your opponent as if they were a wet towel you were trying to dry. If you already have an opponent grappled you may use Wring Out to inflict an automatic 1d8 + MOVE normal damage

description.en: You yawn at your opponent, making them suddenly drowsy. Target one opponent within range that can see you. That target must move a Charisma saving throw against your MOVE DC. On a failure they gain the asleep condition at the start of their next turn. They cannot make a check to wake up on the same turn they fall asleep.

If you hit with this move the target must make a Constitution saving throw against your MOVE DC or become paralyzed.
